events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: missing/unrated test blinds during an in-progress pressure test is a critical, stop-work hazard — the test boundary isolation is unverified, risking a blind blow-off or over-pressurization of adjoining systems. Decision is `fail` with immediate depressurization, engineered blind verification per ASME B31.3 §345, QA sign-off, and exclusion zones before retest.
